skill.memory: didn't do that in a while

expertise.sense: can instinctually sense basic information about the thing
expertise.history: knows about the past of the thing
expertise.theory: knows theories not yet implemented or validated
expertise.lore: knows myths and legends about the thing

preference.homeworker: prefers to work in his own place
preference.expert: pefer to work with someone else's resources
preference.traditional: carries the techniques and tools of previous generations
preference.pragmatic: use most commonly available materials and techniques
preference.spiritual: prefers someone else to do the heavy lifting
preference.lifestyle: it's not just about the grind, let me tell you something brother...
preference.progressive: prefers to work regularly refining methods and tools
preference.mentor: prefers to develop before reaching the goal post

quirk.base: that's how it always been, my way is natural
quirk.cringe: convinced it's imperative for everyone to know as much as possible about this thing
quirk.creep: have preference about this one thing which would break most people and they feel it
quirk.toxic: have preference about this one thing which would break most people and is vocal about it
quirk.nerd: overly focused on this one thing
quirk.geek: very excited by this one thing
quirk.nut: openly believes only this one thing exists and rest is irrelevant
quirk.lead: enjoys moving goal posts before reaching them
quirk.faux: knows someone who can do this one thing but takes the credit for it
quirk.hack: tendency to try new things introducing trial and error
quirk.packie: does this one thing only when everyone else does it
quirk.leech: does this one thing exclusively for monetary gains to continue doing this one thing
quirk.crony: does this one thing only with close associates
quirk.goon: does this one thing because of protective environment
quirk.simp: does this one thing with intention of absorbing as much scraps as possible
quirk.sigma: does this one thing with a habit to create a queue of other like-minded individuals just right behind themselves
quirk.beta: does this one thing by following self-proclaimed leaders in the discipline
quirk.woke: loves the reason for action more than the action itself
quirk.sheepl: ideologically motivated to do this one thing

perk.mah daddy: you continue or usurp legacy of someone who passed.
perk.know a guy: you know a guy who can do affiliated thing as well as you do.

Beginner's Luck: For the purpose of this roll, your total dice points is 3.
Intermediate's Luck: For the purpose of this roll, your total dice points is 5.
Pro Luck: For the purpose of this roll, your total dice points is increased by 3.

no stranger.description: give off that street vibe that u not a snitch

unnotticed.description: Slip unnotticed when Assumed Suspicious. Exploit gaps in awareness and cognition.

admired.description: your fans and enemies always obscure operations against you.

caretaking.description: handle ailments, provide optimal nutrition, entertainment and excercise

recovery.description: can recover from being knocked off the mount

handling.description: can handle mount when it gets emotional

control.description: can push mount to it's limits

bonding.description: mount can look up to you and understand the importance of pushing the limits.

understanding.description: can communicate with mount with body language and imitation sounds

talents.mineralogy: knowledge of materials outside of your work experience
talents.casting: metal casting usually for utility crafting
talents.batching: do same thing in large quantities
talents.masterwork: produce as high quality as possible
talents.improvisation: can work with substitute materials and tools

carpenter.dendrology: knowledge of wood outside of your work experience
carpenter.architecture: can make plans for others. good plans good bonuses
carpenter.construction: can make buildings and coordinate teams
carpenter.masterwork: produce as high quality as possible
carpenter.foraging: can find your own materials in the wild

mason.engineering: can build things that move or enable movement
mason.siege: build things which break other things or resist being broken by things which break other things
mason.monumental: make big things which make people go 'ooh'
mason.masterwork: make one of a kind thing

medical.description: Medical Unit ties to put people together into one piece whenever possible.

prevention.description: Crime Prevention Unit is tasked with keeping society orderly and catching preps anything disorderly it happens.

penal.description: Penal Unit takes care of punishing those who outstep the hard rules of society.

containment.description: Disaster Containment Unit is responsible for Firefighting and rescue missions.

trooper.description: Part of storm trooper squad intented at tackling down larger problems with overwhelming numbers.

intelligence.description: Investigation Unit tasked with untangling most challenging cases to solve.

rep.recognized: you give second thoughts to others

magnetic.description: you find friends in least expected places.

idolized.description: your actions lead to local progress

legendary.description: facts and fiction become undistinguishable, you can write your own story

labels cp.base: does this one thing in popular, established, run of the mill manner.
labels cp.woke: prefers to do this one thing under the pretense of higher purpose. bliss
labels cp.cringe: convinced this one thing is most important for everyone to know as much as possible about
labels cp.creep: have preference about this one thing which would break most people and the feel it
labels cp.toxic: have preference about this one thing which would break most people and is vocal about it
labels cp.nerd: overly focused on this one thing he knows how to do
labels cp.geek: very excited by this one thing he enjoys a lot
labels cp.nut: openly believes there's only this one thing he knows a lot about and rest is secondary
labels cp.faux: knows someone who can do this one thing but takes the credit for it
labels cp.lead: can do this one thing but prefers to walk someone else through doing it instead
labels cp.hack: tendency to try new things introducing trial and error
labels cp.trad: knows how to do it, but it lacks finesse
labels cp.packie: does this one thing only when everyone else does it
labels cp.leech: does this one thing exclusively for monetary gains to continue doing this one thing
labels cp.crony: does this one thing only with close associates
labels cp.goon: does this one thing because of protective environment
labels cp.simp: does this one thing with intention of absorbing as much as possible. blind love
labels cp.sigma: does this one thing with a habit to create a queue of other like-minded individuals just right behind themselves
labels cp.beta: does this one thing by following self-perceived leaders in the discipline
labels cp.sheepl: ideologically motivated to do this one thing
